sigma.title: PUA - PingCastle Execution From Potentially Suspicious Parent

executions.reason: Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 13 direct run(s), 3/3 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
promotion.multi_source_upgrade_note: Upgraded from S5-C-Docker-H to S5-C-Docker-D based on real detections from: falco_bpf_kernel. See sigma_matches.json for corroborating detection records.
promotion.sigma_direct_note: Real Sigma firing confirmed in sigma_evaluation_report.json (Linux osquery or Windows Sysmon GHA telemetry). Cert tier upgraded to direct (-D).

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
